articles.title: Tupac is being digitally resurrected again, this time in a video game. Not everyone likes it - CBC
articles.description: Gamers and influencers watching Summer Game Fest mostly expressed shock and confusion at the inclusion of the influential American rapper and political activist who died in 1996.
articles.content:
Jeff Gerstmann couldn't help but laugh incredulously last week at the announcement that the late, legendary rapper Tupac Shakur would make a digital appearance in an upcoming video game.
